/**
     * Some aspects of handling need to be changed for JDK types (and possibly
     * some extensions under {@code javax.}?): for example, forcing of access

     * @since 2.11

javadoc_after:
/** * Accessor for checking whether given {@code Class} is under Java package * of {@code java.*} or {@code javax.*} (including all sub-packages). *

* Added since some aspects of handling need to be changed for JDK types (and * possibly some extensions under {@code javax.}?): for example, forcing of access * will not work well for future JDKs (12 and later). *

* Note: in Jackson 2.11 only returned true for {@code java.*} (and not {@code javax.*}); * was changed in 2.12. * * @since 2.11 */
